name: Bank Of Winnfield & Trust Company
description_short: Community bank in Winnfield, LA offering personal and business checking, savings, consumer loans, and trust services with two local branches.
description_long:
Bank of Winnfield & Trust Company is a community-based financial institution serving Winnfield, Louisiana and the surrounding area. The bank operates two physical branches—a main branch at 200 W Main St and a northside branch at 5932 Highway 167 N—providing traditional banking services to both personal and business customers.

The bank offers a range of core banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, consumer loans, and business lending services. They provide modern digital banking capabilities through a mobile app compatible with iOS and Android devices, allowing customers to check balances, transfer money, and pay bills remotely. Debit card services include the ability to add cards to Samsung and Google Wallet, transaction alerts, and after-hours fraud monitoring support.

Bank of Winnfield distinguishes itself as a local, community-focused institution with direct phone access to specific departments. They maintain personalized service channels including a dedicated bookkeeping department and a customer service email address, alongside their digital offerings. The bank emphasizes security practices such as offering secured email communication through their online banking portal and providing clear warnings about email interception risks.

As a small community bank, Bank of Winnfield serves customers seeking local relationship banking with traditional in-person service rather than a national or online-only institution. However, the website content is limited and does not provide detailed information about specific loan products, interest rates, fees, account minimums, or trust company services beyond their name. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Debit card services with Samsung and Google Wallet integration
pros: Two physical branch locations for in-person banking in Winnfield, LA area
Mobile app available on iOS and Android with balance checking, transfers, and bill pay
Debit card integration with Samsung and Google Wallet for contactless payments
After-hours debit card fraud monitoring available 24/7 at 800-500-1044
Debit alerts for transaction notifications via mobile app
Personalized customer service with dedicated bookkeeping department phone line
Secured online banking portal for confidential email communications
cons: Limited to two physical locations in Winnfield, LA with no online account opening mentioned
Website lacks detailed information about loan products, rates, fees, and account requirements
No information provided about minimum deposit requirements, APYs, or account types
Trust company services mentioned in name but not described on website
Appears to lack modern features like online account opening, instant digital debit cards, or fintech integrations beyond Samsung/Google Wallet
best_for: Winnfield, LA residents seeking local community banking with in-person branch access
Small business owners in the area needing business lending and local relationships
Customers who prefer traditional banking with personalized service over digital-only banks
People seeking a local alternative to national chain banks
diagnosis: Bank of Winnfield & Trust Company is best for Winnfield-area residents and small business owners who value local, relationship-based banking with physical branch access and personalized service. The main caveat is that as a small community bank with limited online presence, it may lack the breadth of products, competitive rates, and digital conveniences that larger banks or online-only institutions offer, and the website provides insufficient detail to evaluate specific loan terms or account features.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
